name: Clione's Bomb-Bomb Sweeper
short_description: A spin-off from the asymmetric party action game "Goonya Monster," with character designs by Terada Tera! Break through the oncoming blocks and advance! This is a fresh, exhilarating puzzle action game that fuses bomb puzzles with unique "Goonya Monster" action!
detailed_description:
"Clione's Bomb-Bomb Sweeper" is an action puzzle game featuring Clione, the younger brother-in-law of Pirarucu, who appears in "Goonya Monster."

Suddenly transported to a mysterious passageway, Clione finds himself in danger!

Massive blocks roll forward, and the path behind crumbles over time?!

It’s a major crisis! Using his Shooter, Clione must break through the blocks and push forward step by step!

◆ Break Blocks Boldly, But Carefully!

　 Destroying a bomb-containing block means game over!

　 Use the numbers displayed on the ground to help avoid bombs and clear the path!

◆ Activate the Universal Sweeper!

　 When the gauge is full, the Shooter powers up, and the Universal Sweeper activates!

　 Without fear of bombs, sweep through all blocks and advance!

◆ Use Items Wisely!

　 Items can sometimes be found in the passage.

　 They include items that "reveal bombs," "generate a large number of Souls," and "instantly fill the gauge."

◆ Organize Your Thoughts with Bomb Checks!

　 If you think a block looks suspicious, mark it with a check to help guess bomb locations!

supported_languages: Japanese, English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
